minorName: Native Ratio Optimizer, Configurable Objectives & Power Metrics

patches.subject: feat: rebuild ratio optimization around native SCIP and configurable objectives
items: Replaced the previous ratio optimization path with a native WebAssembly model builder backed by SCIP 10.0.2 and SoPlex 8.0.2, avoiding repeated MPS serialization and parsing during normal solves.

Reworked ratio optimization into ordered stages that first minimize shortages, then minimize excess sent toward sinks, enforce user limits, optimize configured objective tiers, and finally minimize fractional machine count as a deterministic tie-breaker.
Added exact mixed-integer handling for machine cost, machine space, and machine model count so these objectives use rounded-up whole-machine counts instead of fractional LP counts.

Added configurable optimization objectives for power use, power output, net pollution, machine cost, machine space, and machine model count, including importance weights, objective tiers, ordering, output goals, and optional limits.

Added a redesigned ratio optimizer configuration panel with simpler objective descriptions, solve-time guidance for rounded objectives, consistent scrollbars, and a reserved mode selector for future recipe autocomplete.
Expanded solver results to show recipe and machine names alongside before-and-after power use, power output, net pollution, machine cost, machine space, and machine model count totals.

Added native graph presolve, safe target-derived scaling and bounds, reusable staged models, a direct SoPlex path for continuous LP solves, and a reduced SCIP MILP path when rounded objectives are enabled.

Improved solver reliability for large machine targets through formal coefficient scaling, centralized floating-point tolerances, target-value preservation, post-solve validation, and numerically safe whole-machine ceiling rules.

Reduced solver transfer and memory overhead with typed-array payloads and compact binary results, explicit native allocation cleanup, persistent worker reuse, cancellation support, page-load warmup, progress reporting, and console telemetry.
Bundled PaPILO 3.0.0 and oneTBB 2021.13.0 with pthread support, growable WebAssembly memory, and separate reliability profiles for direct LP and rounded MILP solves.
Added support for machines with infinite purchase cost: dashboards preserve the infinite total, while cost-aware optimization excludes those machines unless their use is unavoidable.

Renamed Power Consumption to Power Use and Power Production to Power Output throughout dashboards, recipe data, optimizer configuration, TypeScript contracts, worker payloads, and native solver fields, with migration support for existing local overrides and saved optimizer settings.
Redesigned Production Stats with separate MV and HV power-use and power-output rows, net pollution, profit, machine cost, machine space in squares, and machine model count.

Added machine-space and model-count calculations for modular machines, Research Station 3 with Research Station 4, and Satellite Dish Controllers, plus canvas-wide research infrastructure totals and optimal satellite-dish counts.

Added cross-origin isolation headers required by threaded WebAssembly and documented a reproducible Docker build with pinned SCIP, SoPlex, PaPILO, oneTBB, and Emscripten versions, checksums, generated bundle metadata, and native smoke tests.

minorName: Tutorials, Custom Saves, Solver Tuning & Orthogonal Edge Routing

patches.subject: stuff
items: Configured public asset sitemap.xml and robots.txt files for search engine indexing.
Added SEO metadata headers, og:image thumbnails, and description metadata tag fields to index.html.
Updated Vite bundle output directories.

patches.subject: help overlay
items: Added the searchable, tab-indexed Help Overlay containing Start, Controls, and Troubleshoot sections.
Implemented keyword searching and collapsible sections across all help items.
Wrote background idle handlers to prefetch overlay articles for instant drawer transitions.

patches.subject: ongod, tutorials
items: Introduced the interactive, step-by-step Guided Tutorial system with three distinct learning paths.
Created custom guides for First Production Chain, Groups/Collapsed layouts (including a pre-built Gearbox flow), and the Data Overlay.
Developed the tutorial overlay highlight elements and configured automatic startup prompts for first-time visitors.

patches.subject: tips
items: Added a dedicated Tips & Hints tab to the Help panel to compile shortcuts, solver behaviors, and design workflow advice.
Centralized tips into a single, reusable list and replaced inline tips in the LP Solver panel with this shared source.
Implemented a Fisher-Yates shuffle routine to randomize tips shown on the solver loading screens.

patches.subject: feat: expand historical release notes and optimize help panel loading
items: Expanded all historical version summaries in the Help panel with detailed, comprehensive release notes.
Resolved application package bundle loading and type resolution issues.

patches.subject: feat: bundle database overrides in saves, add custom filter, and resolve lint bugs
items: Added a 'Show Custom Only' checkbox to filter custom and modified records inside the Data Manager.
Bundled active custom database overrides directly inside slot saves and JSON exports.
Added a 'CUSTOM DB' warning badge on saves in the Save Manager list.
Implemented a three-way load/merge confirm dialog to choose Load Data & Canvas, Load Canvas Only, or Abort.
Integrated database override validation upon loading custom saves, falling back to canvas-only if invalid.
Resolved multiple ESLint react-hooks/refs, set-state-in-effect, and typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any compilation errors.

patches.subject: feat: optimize sink priority solver weights and machine scaling rules
items: Generalized sink node detection in the LP solver to identify nodes with zero outputs (e.g. Exhaust Stack, Burners, Dumps, and Generators) or variable inputs.
Implemented scoped deficit penalty weights: standard recipe deficits are penalized at 1e12, sink-connected excesses at 1e8, and auxiliary sink inputs (e.g. UWF inputs) at 1e4.
Added scaling independence settings for special recipes to bypass machine count multipliers on specific ports (e.g. UWF inputs).
Updated RecipeNodeIO handle coordinates to correctly handle machine count scaling bypass.

patches.subject: feat: standardize depot and single-input burner/dump/incinerator recipe semantics
items: Converted all depot special recipes to fixed constant quantities, keeping their dynamic product resolution.
Converted single-input burners, dumps, and incinerators to constant quantities and removed their machine count independence settings.
Configured the Item Dump special recipe with dual variable inputs, flow-dependent pollution, and machine-count independence matching the Liquid Dump.

patches.subject: feat: allow arbitrary bends on orthogonal edges and overhaul auto layout
items: Overhauled the auto layout utility around ELK-based graph layout, grid-snapped placement, fixed port sizing, deterministic handle ordering, and geometry-aware orthogonal edge routing.
Reorganized codebase by moving edge routing and geometry utilities to a dedicated `src/utils/canvas` directory.

patches.subject: fix: finalize auto layout pipeline and harden PNG export
items: Moved Auto Layout into a dedicated `src/layout` subsystem with separated ELK graph construction, materialization, result application, and port-order refinement modules.
Improved layout consistency with deterministic ELK settings, fixed-size ports, geometry-aware handle order refinement, and per-edge priorities for flow, feedback, and self-loop edges.
Hardened PNG canvas export for Firefox by inlining theme variables, resolving SVG edge paint styles before capture, and disabling export-time paint optimizations that could hide text or edges.

patches.subject: recipe editor, yeah, special recipe read only for now
items: Added the Recipes Editor tab to the Data Overlay to manage recipe items, inputs, and outputs.
Configured special recipes as read-only lists and added a 'Restore Baseline Defaults' button for resets.

patches.subject: comparators
items: Created proxy backend API endpoints to fetch official database tables from the Industrialist wiki.
Added initial UI structures for the Data Comparator tab inside the Data Overlay.

patches.subject: cache of buckets
items: Implemented local IndexedDB caching for wiki comparator data to enable instantaneous loads.
Added cache staleness warnings and background freshness checks when offline.

patches.subject: data comparators
items: Expanded the Data Comparator UI into an interactive side-by-side diff view for products, machines, and recipes.
Grouped changes by diff status and implemented virtualized lists to handle large comparator datasets.
Corrected multiple database entries inside `products.json` and `recipes.json` based on comparator findings.

patches.subject: finished comparator
items: Completed the Data Comparator UI with filter tabs, difference badge counts, and expand/collapse toggle rows.
Consolidated and cleaned up styles inside the Data Overlay stylesheets.

patches.subject: some reductions
items: Consolidated tab-specific stylesheets inside the Data Overlay into a single shared stylesheet to improve design consistency.

patches.subject: lp solver reductions
items: Enhanced the LP Solver failure logging to generate detailed root cause diagnostic reports.
Outputs human-readable diagnostics such as 'Deficient feedback loop' or 'Connected product mismatch' with flow details.
Refactored LP Solver files into modular segments (`lpModel`, `lpPayload`, `lpSolution`, `lpTypes`).

patches.subject: some fixes, variant recipes also
items: Added variant recipe support, enabling machine nodes to switch between recipe configurations (e.g. fuel types) inside the settings panel.
Configured group node proxy ports to render product labels, flow rates, and connections dynamically from active member nodes.
Polished the Machine Editor form in the Data Overlay to support additional parameters.

patches.subject: fixes to auto layout
items: Improved Auto Layout stability by isolating group and recipe nodes into separate layers during layout execution.
Memoized connection resolution contexts and edge lists to optimize rendering speeds.

patches.subject: nearly done variants
items: Completed the variant recipe resolution system and handle type validation checks.
Configured connections to reject invalid wire configurations (e.g., solid output linked to fluid input).
Initialized the ratio optimizer solver worker during startup execution.

patches.subject: temp mins, performance fixes, and a working cpp calc!!!!!!!!
items: Established absolute zero (-273.15°C) as the global minimum bound for temperature input fields.
Completed the Coal Power Plant (CPP) special recipe calculator, resolving burn rates and efficiency configurations.
Optimized connection validation on larger layouts by implementing validation context caching.

patches.subject: turbine fixes
items: Corrected the Modular Turbine special recipe calculations for fuel consumption and power output rates.
Fixed fuel percentage math inside the Coal Power Plant calculator.

patches.subject: a few more recipes
items: Expanded the machine database to include Hand Pump, Energy Wheel, and Hand Crank items.
Implemented node and edge power output/use display metrics on the canvas.
Modified power display tags to handle text wrapping.

minorName: Group Nodes, Collapsed States & Nested Layouts

patches.subject: foundation for group nodes
items: Laid down the structural foundation for Group Nodes and integrated them into the canvas, database schema, and solver.
Configured basic connection checks on proxy container boundaries.

patches.subject: expanded group nodes, todo collapsed
items: Developed the expanded Group Node wrapper rendering child nodes inside a bounding box.
Added the Group Editor overlay panel to rename groups and manage child nodes.
Added the 'Add Group' action to the controls tray and displayed group bounding previews during drag actions.

patches.subject: collapsed group node
items: Implemented the collapsed mode for Group Nodes, hiding internal layouts behind a single compact proxy block.
Routed external connections correctly through group proxy ports to internal node ports.

patches.subject: fixes to group nodes
items: Fixed group node bugs to ensure nodes insert correctly into existing groups.
Updated the dashboard panels to support group nodes.

patches.subject: muhahaeheaheahe better auto layout respecting group nodes and shi
items: Overhauled the Auto Layout module to treat expanded group nodes as atomic bounding boxes.
Configured auto layout to position child nodes inside group boundaries and route edges around groups.

patches.subject: some updates to formulas
items: Corrected formula rates and constants for the Air Separation Unit, Alloyer, Geothermal Well, Liquid Dump, Steam Cracking Plant, and Truck Depot.
Improved unit formatting helper scripts.

patches.subject: layout
items: Implemented the initial Auto Layout tool using the ELK layout engine to organize nodes left-to-right.
Added support for orthogonal edge path generation when running layouts.

patches.subject: improvements to auto layout
items: Improved the Auto Layout engine with a two-pass strategy to reduce crossing and organize vertical spacing.
Configured the layout calculator to adjust node distances according to edge styling preferences.

patches.subject: lp solverrrrrr
items: Introduced the LP Solver overlay panel, using the SCIP solver running inside a background WebWorker.
Preloaded the solver WebAssembly binary on startup to ensure zero interface delay on execution.
Wired solver output state directly to target node machine counts and edge highlight classes.

patches.subject: machine toggles, still have to add tiers and specific machine checkboxes
items: Introduced the lazy-loaded Machine Overlay panel, allowing users to browse the machine research tree and stats.
Laid down the groundwork for tier selection filters and toggles.

patches.subject: MDEs
items: Completed the Modular Diesel Engine special recipe, implementing dynamic formulas for cylinder count, crankshaft load, and fuel consumption rates.

patches.subject: mambo
items: Refactored the internal Boiler special recipe formula module to simplify calculations.
Integrated research unlocks and global difficulty modifiers into the Machine Overlay filters.
Added special recipe output previewing inside the Settings Editor panel.

patches.subject: recipe car name
items: Fixed recipe card name display issues in the Recipe Selector modal.

patches.subject: fixes ""
items: Resolved bugs across edge rendering, node info boxes, toolbar buttons, and overlay panels.
Added flowing dash animations to active edges on the canvas to indicate material flow directions.

patches.subject: multi-select
items: Added multi-select support using Ctrl/Cmd-clicks or the toolbar selector toggle.
Enabled dragging multiple selected nodes together and added a count badge to the toolbar.

patches.subject: theme editorrrrr
items: Introduced the Theme Editor panel to allow live customization of canvas backgrounds, borders, and typography.
Migrated styles to a CSS variable-based token system and defined a default dark mode theme.

patches.subject: catmul roms on bezier curve edges yeeaaaaaaa
items: Implemented Catmull-Rom Bezier curves for smooth curved canvas edge rendering.
Enabled adding, dragging, and deleting custom control points directly on edges to adjust routing.
Saved edge control points and curves in the slot database and added edge options to the Theme Editor.

patches.subject: adjustable orthogonal edges ye
items: Enabled segment dragging on orthogonal right-angle connection paths.
Restricted segment edits to perpendicular bounds to maintain correct orthogonal path geometry.
Saved custom orthogonal waypoint layouts inside the active workspace slot.

patches.subject: special recipesssssssss
items: Introduced the dynamic Special Recipe system, enabling formula-based inputs and outputs for custom machines.
Added 'Good to Sell (Profit)' and 'Good for Research' checkboxes to the Product Editor.
Updated the Recipe Selector to display dynamic input/output previews for special recipes.

patches.subject: support for recipe possible inputs and outputs
items: Added support for optional input and output ports that toggle dynamically based on machine settings.
Configured potential port configurations for the Industrial Firebox and Logic Assembler.
Enhanced Recipe Selector searches to match products indexed as potential or optional inputs/outputs.

patches.subject: special recipes almost complete, rahhhhhh
items: Added an explanatory text description panel to the Node Editor for special recipe nodes.
Completed the baseline formulas for the Alloyer, Air Separation Unit, and Coal Liquefaction Plant.
Refined computed input/output previews shown on recipe lookup cards.

patches.subject: somewhat working heat exchangerssss
items: Implemented steady-state thermodynamic formulas for the Heat Exchanger and Vertical Heat Exchanger.
Configured nodes to display live thermal outputs derived from coolant and fluid inputs.
Cleaned up obsolete and duplicate entries inside `recipes.json`.

patches.subject: tree flippin farm
items: Developed upstream and downstream dependency highlighting in the Recipe Selector.
Improved product pre-selection filters to correctly resolve special recipe variants.
Polished thermodynamic math constants in the Heat Exchanger modules.

patches.subject: fxies
items: Overhauled the central data lookup and registry system to solve lookup data sync bugs.
Fixed layout rendering errors and step navigation in the Recipe Selector cards.

patches.subject: yes
items: Established the central Flow Solver pipeline loop, orchestrating graph construction, flow allocation, and temperature propagation in a deterministic sequence.

patches.subject: some "fixes"
items: Refactored the Flow Solver pipeline modules, dividing responsibilities between modules to guarantee correct computations on complex loops.
Extended wildcard type checks and potential port filtering inside the Recipe Selector.

patches.subject: smol change
items: Added special recipe structures for the Liquid Burner and Liquid Dump.
Resolved edge-case errors in the graph building module of the solver.
Fixed recipe card labels and connection handle layout alignments.

patches.subject: fixes to solvers and utils apparently
items: Reorganized the codebase filesystem layout, moving helpers and utilities into distinct modules.
Fixed solver graph building bugs and set up prefetch caching structures.

patches.subject: icon immutability
items: Configured browser caching policies for product icons to prevent redundant network fetches and speed up modal loading states.
Appended cache-busting version parameters to asset URLs to ensure prompt loading of new icons.

patches.subject: undo/redooo
items: Built the canvas history manager to support global undo and redo actions.
Integrated Undo/Redo trigger buttons into the main canvas toolbar and mapped them to standard keyboard shortcuts.

patches.subject: some stuff, wildcard handles
items: Introduced wildcard connection ports typed as `any_fluid` or `any_item` to accept any compatible product of that category.
Implemented connection verification logic to resolve wildcard port types and validate product compatibility before linking.
Refactored the styling and layout of Data Overlay form lists.

patches.subject: some fixes, alloyer yah
items: Added a dedicated temperature display badge to recipe nodes to show live thermal metrics.
Imported base recipe formulas and configuration details for the Alloyer machine.
Improved connection verification routines to correctly resolve and allow links to wildcard handles.
Restructured the layout of the dashboard side stats panel.

patches.subject: variable quantity and wildcard handle
items: Implemented variable-quantity sink handles representing dynamic flow limits rather than fixed rates.
Overhauled Boiler, Alloyer, and Air Separation Unit configurations to integrate variable-quantity handles.
Enabled canvas snap-to-grid alignment rules.

patches.subject: fixes again
items: Added a descriptive capacity warning label to variable-quantity handles inside the Node Editor IO panel.
Fixed state conflicts in the Node Editor and corrected handle selection parameters inside the Recipe Selector.
Configured HTML preloading rules for the application logo to accelerate initial asset paint.

patches.subject: boilerrrrrrrrrrrrr
items: Implemented the Boiler special recipe formula, dynamically computing steam temperatures based on fuel inputs.
Exposed temperature target adjustments and fuel selection menus in the Node Editor for Boiler nodes.
Added research requirement controls to the Data Overlay Research form.

patches.subject: iconssssssssss
items: Integrated `.webp` graphical icons for products across recipe nodes, selection list items, and stats panels.

patches.subject: Initial commit
items: Initialized the project repository and configured the open-source license.

patches.subject: base calc and canvas
items: Scaffolded the base calculator canvas with an interactive node-based recipe layout.
Configured basic input and output handles on recipe nodes for connection routing.
Imported baseline game database configurations for products, machines, and recipes.
Integrated the SCIP linear programming solver compiling to WebAssembly inside the browser.
Configured local storage persistence to auto-save canvas progress.

patches.subject: some fixes
items: Fixed early canvas drawing offsets and recipe node rendering layout bugs.
Enhanced the Node Editor UI controls layout and improved the Help controls tray.
Optimized recipe selector search tabs for filtering by machine and product type.

patches.subject: fixes 2
items: Refactored canvas panning, zooming, and node dragging event handlers into clean, isolated layers.
Restructured node input/output port layout for improved clarity and interaction target bounds.
Resolved canvas mouse-focus conflicts and updated the controls tray interface.

patches.subject: feat: implement recipe selector interface and flow solver architecture
items: Implemented the multi-step Recipe Selector browsing overlay with search and category filters.
Added and preloaded the official application logo (`induslogo.webp`) to optimize loading performance.
Designed a startup loading spinner and introduced the background scaffolding for the flow solver pipeline.

patches.subject: saves manager, need to do some cleaning
items: Introduced the Saves Manager, supporting local slot saves, JSON file export, and file imports.
Developed the graph merge utility to combine saved layout configurations into the active canvas.
Added PNG image export functionality for downloading canvas snapshots.
Configured IndexedDB to automatically back up active workspace state on changes.

patches.subject: Apply canvas panning fixes
items: Resolved canvas panning conflicts where viewport drags interfered with node selection events.
Optimized viewport rendering performance using flat CAD boxes during high-speed pan/zoom actions.
Configured coordinated viewport culling to only render visible elements when node counts exceed 250.
Improved PNG export layout calculations and bounding box crop accuracy.

patches.subject: indicators for save overlay buttons
items: Added pending loading spinners and action disable states to Save Manager buttons to prevent double operations.
Implemented visual indicators to highlight unsaved changes in the active canvas slot.

patches.subject: panels
items: Introduced the floating dashboard panels to display live graph stats and select node details.
Integrated node display state reactions to special recipe configurations, such as high-voltage tags.

patches.subject: Product and Machine Editor
items: Introduced the lazy-loaded Data Overlay containing the Product and Machine Editor forms.
Created custom fields to view, add, modify, or restore products and machines to baseline settings.

patches.subject: research editor
items: Added the Research and Technology Prerequisites editor tab to the Data Overlay.
Implemented visual locked/unlocked indicator badges on canvas recipe nodes.
Optimized layout performance by forcing recipe nodes into flat, compact styles when zoomed out below 35%.
Linked node heights dynamically to CSS variables and configured reactive updates for global pollution settings.
